page.main: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 pt-28 pb-20
page.breadcrumbNav: mt-6 mb-8 text-xs sm:text-sm text-[var(--drivon-muted)] uppercase tracking-wide
page.headerImageWrap: relative h-[240px] sm:h-[280px] mb-6 overflow-hidden rounded-lg
page.headerOverlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 via-transparent to-transparent
page.headerTitleOnImage: absolute bottom-5 left-0 right-0 text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-display font-semibold text-white px-4 uppercase tracking-wide
page.headerTitleNoImage: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-display font-semibold text-[var(--drivon-text)] mb-2 uppercase tracking-wide
page.mobileFilterBtn: w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 bg-[var(--drivon-surface)] text-[var(--drivon-text)] text-sm font-medium rounded-lg border border-[var(--drivon-border)] hover:bg-[var(--drivon-card)] transition-colors
page.overlay: fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 z-40 hidden lg:hidden
page.sidebar: w-full lg:w-72 flex-shrink-0 fixed lg:relative top-0 left-0 h-full lg:h-auto bg-[var(--drivon-card)] border-r border-[var(--drivon-border)] z-40 lg:z-auto transform -translate-x-full lg:translate-x-0 transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out lg:block
page.sidebarTitle: text-sm font-display font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-[var(--drivon-text)]
page.sortDropdownSelect: appearance-none bg-[var(--drivon-surface)] border border-[var(--drivon-border)] rounded-md px-4 py-2 pr-8 text-sm font-medium text-[var(--drivon-text)] hover:border-[var(--drivon-text)]/50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--drivon-accent)]/30 transition-colors cursor-pointer
page.topBar: flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center justify-between gap-3 mb-6
page.viewToggleGroup: flex items-center gap-0.5 rounded-lg border border-[var(--drivon-border)] p-0.5 bg-[var(--drivon-surface)]
page.gridBtnActive: p-2 rounded-md bg-[var(--drivon-card)] text-[var(--drivon-text)] shadow-sm border border-[var(--drivon-border)]
page.mobileCount: text-xs text-[var(--drivon-muted)] uppercase tracking-wide mb-4 sm:hidden
page.productGrid: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-5 lg:gap-6 items-start collection-product-grid
page.loadMoreBtn: bg-[var(--drivon-card)] border border-[var(--drivon-border)] text-[var(--drivon-text)] px-6 py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-[var(--drivon-surface)] transition-colors font-medium
page.emptyWrap: text-center py-16 bg-[var(--drivon-card)] rounded-2xl border border-[var(--drivon-border)]
page.emptyTitle: text-2xl font-display font-semibold text-[var(--drivon-text)] mb-2 uppercase tracking-wide
page.paginationPrev: px-4 py-2 rounded-lg border border-[var(--drivon-border)] text-[var(--drivon-muted)] hover:text-[var(--drivon-text)] hover:bg-[var(--drivon-surface)] transition-colors
page.paginationNext: px-4 py-2 rounded-lg border border-[var(--drivon-border)] text-[var(--drivon-muted)] hover:text-[var(--drivon-text)] hover:bg-[var(--drivon-surface)] transition-colors

button.default: w-full mt-4 px-4 py-2 bg-blue-950 text-white rounded-md hover:bg-blue-900 transition-colors

pagination.container: flex justify-center items-center gap-6 mt-12 bg-gray-50 py-4 rounded-lg
pagination.button: px-6 py-3 bg-blue-950 text-white rounded-md hover:bg-blue-900 transition-colors uppercase font-bold tracking-wider

header.image: w-full h-full object-cover opacity-30 filter brightness-50

productGrid.container: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 mb-12 rounded-xl shadow-sm

productCard.card: bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300
productCard.image: w-full h-full object-contain p-4 transition-transform duration-300 group-hover:scale-105
productCard.noImagePlaceholder: w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400
productCard.title: text-lg font-medium text-gray-900 truncate mb-1 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors

quickAddButton.base: absolute bottom-2 left-2 right-2 bg-blue-950 text-white py-2 rounded-md text-sm font-medium

pagination.container: flex justify-between items-center bg-white rounded-lg shadow-sm p-4
pagination.button: flex items-center space-x-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors group
